events.event_description: U.S. diplomatic representation in Jordan established with Wells Stabler presenting credentials as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim, indicating the opening of a U.S. Legation.

evidence.quote: Wells Stabler, Chargé d'Affaires ad interim. Credentials presented: 1949-02-18. Left post: 1950-02.

events.event_description: U.S. Legation in Jordan elevated to Embassy when Joseph Coy Green was promoted from Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary and presented credentials.

evidence.quote: Joseph Coy Green, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1952-05-14. Credentials presented: 1952-07-31. Promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary 1952-09-23.
